projects.name: USB PD Type-C Breakout
projects.tagline: Flexible USB-C Power Delivery breakout for prototypes, test rigs, and bench power workflows.
projects.summary: A compact USB Type-C Power Delivery breakout board with selectable voltages, publishable board files, and vendor reference documents.
projects.lead: Keep board files, vendor references, and generated outputs tied to the same public project record.
overview: The USB PD Type-C Breakout repository already produces the documentation artifacts that a support site needs: schematics, board dimensions, vendor datasheets, and placeholder code buckets.
This manifest gives the learn site enough metadata to ingest those artifacts automatically and expose them on a project page without hand-editing the frontend for each new hardware release.
highlights: Publishes schematics, board dimensions, and vendor datasheets from the hardware repo.
Uses a reusable workflow hosted by the learn site repository.
Keeps the project ready for richer editorial content later.
